title: Vulkan FPS and Utility
description: FPS and Utility but it has Vulkan mod so u get even more FPS
body:
Introducing the "FPS and Utility" - a specialized Minecraft modpack meticulously designed to significantly increase your FPS and optimize your gameplay experience. This carefully curated collection of mods focuses on utilizing Vulkan as the rendering engine, delivering superior performance and enhanced visuals.

By utilizing the Vulkan Mod as the rendering engine, this modpack offers a significant FPS boost compared to other alternatives. Combined with performance-enhancing mods like Lithium, BetterFps, and optimization-focused tweaks, you can expect smoother gameplay and increased frame rates.

Upgrade your Minecraft experience with the "FPS and Utility" and enjoy the benefits of Vulkan's superior performance and enhanced FPS. Explore your world with improved visuals and responsiveness, all while maintaining a smooth and immersive gameplay experience.

Please note that Vulkan Mod requires a compatible graphics card and drivers to function properly. It is recommended to check the mod's requirements and ensure compatibility with your system.

For sodium version with more utility mods , visit here :

[FPS and Utility](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fps-and-utility)
